summary: Backend testing completed for Monthly Salary History feature. All 18 tests passed, covering all 7 endpoints: POST /api/salary/save, GET /api/salary/history, GET /api/salary/history/{year}/{month}, PUT /api/salary/history/{year}/{month}/{emp_code}, DELETE /api/salary/history/{year}/{month}, GET /api/salary/compare/{year1}/{month1}/{year2}/{month2}, GET /api/salary/employee/{emp_code}/growth
passed_tests: API health check - returns status healthy
GET /api/salary/history - returns list of saved months with correct structure
GET /api/salary/history/2026/1 - returns existing salary record with employee data
GET /api/salary/history/1999/1 - returns proper error for non-existent month
POST /api/salary/save - saves new salary record with 2 employees
POST /api/salary/save - upsert updates existing record (changes employeeCount and totalPayout)
PUT /api/salary/history - non-existent employee returns proper error
PUT /api/salary/history - non-existent record returns proper error
GET /api/salary/compare - missing month returns proper error
GET /api/salary/compare - both months missing returns proper error
GET /api/salary/employee/E001/growth - returns growth data with history
DELETE /api/salary/history/2024/6 - deletes record and verifies deletion
DELETE /api/salary/history/1999/1 - non-existent record returns proper error
Cleanup - test data cleaned up successfully
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - all endpoints properly handle database connection errors
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded using {"_id": 0} projection in all queries
Upsert pattern implemented correctly for salary save
Update endpoint recalculates totalPayout when employee salary is modified
Growth calculation handles edge case of single month (returns 0 growth)
Comparison endpoint handles employees present in only one month
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. Original test data preserved: 2025-12 (totalPayout: 14500, employee E001) and 2026-01 (totalPayout: 16500, employee E001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Salary History APIs fully tested and working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_salary_history.py covers all CRUD operations, comparison, and growth tracking. Existing test data in MongoDB: 2025-12 and 2026-01 records with employee E001.
